discord-username.description: Discord username for provider contact. Required for audited providers; you must be in the Akash Discord with the Provider role.

organization.description: Name of the organization that owns the provider.

status-page.description: Link to a status page for the provider.

location-region.description: Geo location region of the provider. Preferred on-chain key is location-region; legacy region is still read for backward compatibility. Based on the United Nations geoscheme. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_Nations_geoscheme

country.description: Country ISO 3166 Alpha-2 code of the provider. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_3166_country_codes

city.description: City 3 letter code code of the provider. https://www.hh-express.com/en/support/three_code/harbor.html

timezone.description: Timezone UTC-12 to UTC+14 of the provider. https://www.timeanddate.com/time/map/

location-type.description: One of: datacenter, colo, home, office, mix.

hosting-provider.description: Name of the datacenter, colo, public cloud, etc where hosted.

hardware-gpu-capability.description: GPU capability keys including model, RAM, and interface.

hardware-persistent-storage-class.description: Primary persistent storage class (beta1 HDD, beta2 SSD, beta3 NVMe).

hardware-persistent-storage-capability.description: True if storage class 1 provides persistent storage.

hardware-cuda.description: CUDA version available on GPU nodes (for example 12.7).

feat-persistent-storage.description: True if the provider offers persistent storage.

feat-shm.description: True if the provider offers shared memory (SHM) via the ram storage class.

tier.description: Is this an Akash hosted provider or community hosted?

feat-endpoint-ip.description: Does this provider support leasing of IP addresses?

feat-endpoint-custom-domain.description: Does this provider support custom domains?
